title: Squeaky Dog Toys, Interactive Latex Puppies Toy with Quack Whistle, [3 Pack] Funny Toys Soft Rubber Chicken Duck for Small Medium Dogs (Green Dinosaur + Yellow Chicken + Blue Duck)
features: Unique Dog Squeaky Toys: The interactive dog toys come with a built-in long squeaker, producing a distinctive "Quack" sound when pressed or chewed—unlike the common sounds. This special sound effectively sparks your dog's inherent curiosity and hunting instincts, prompting them to engage in active play. As your dog chases and bites to trigger the sound, it helps them release pent-up energy, reduce stress, and alleviate anxiety, keeping them happily occupied for extended periods

3-Piece Cute Animal Collection: The dog toy set includes a green dinosaur, yellow chicken, and blue duck, each featuring adorable designs and bright, vivid colors that easily catch your dog's eye. These charming animal shapes add extra allure, motivating your dog to play more and stay free from boredom. Every dog squeaky toy is designed to be visually appealing, making playtime a more delightful experience for your beloved pet

Safe Latex for Gentle & Secure Chewing: Crafted from premium, non-toxic latex material, these interactive squeaky dog toys are gentle on your dog's gums, making them perfect for teething puppies. The soft yet sturdy latex ensures safe chewing sessions. Important note: Not suitable for dogs with aggressive chewing habits. For your pet's safety, it is advised to always use these toys under supervision

Ideal Size for Small & Medium Dog Breeds: Measuring approximately 8.67×1.97×2.76 in and weighing 75g, this lightweight interactive dog toy is perfectly sized for small and medium breeds such as French Bulldog, English Springer Spaniels, Border Collies, Staffordshire Bull Terriers, English Bulldogs, Cocker Spaniels, and German Shepherds(Small dogs are generally recommended to weigh over 20 pounds). The dimensions are carefully selected to fit their chewing and playing requirements comfortably

Boost Interactive Bonding Time: Perfect for interactive games: hide the squeaky dog toy and press it to make sounds for your dog to locate you, or toss it into the air/throw it for them to fetch. These activities enhance interactive fun, promote healthy physical exercise, and create precious bonding moments with your pet. Regular play helps keep your dog active and strengthens the special relationship between you and your furry companion
description: Product Description Still searching for fun and safe toys for your medium-sized dog? This 3-piece dog toy bundle combines unique features to keep your furry friend entertained, active, and content—designed with their happiness and safety in mind. A Perfect Blend of Fun & Function : Our dog toys boost play with purposeful designs—a unique ""Quack"" squeaker (not ordinary beeps) triggers your dog’s curiosity and hunting instincts, encouraging self-initiated play. Safe elastic latex offers flexible grip for easy sound activation, while vibrant designs keep them focused. Chasing, nudging, and chewing relieves boredom, reduces stress, and strengthens your bond through joyful interaction. Safe, Gentle & Easy to Clean Latex: Crafted from high-quality non-toxic latex, these squeak latex dog toy are soft on gums—ideal for teething puppies. The latex material makes cleanup simple: just rinse with water or wipe with a damp cloth. It even lets your dog enjoy water play, adding versatility to their fun. (Note: Not for aggressive chewers; supervise play for safety.) A Wonderful Gift for Your Furry Family Member: Looking for a thoughtful present? This 3-piece dog interactive toys is a fantastic gift for Christmas, Halloween, birthdays, or any occasion. It’s the perfect way to spoil your fur baby, catering to all their playtime needs—from teething relief to interactive games. Give your dog endless joy with TONGKTAI’s cute animal latex dog toy squeaky set—where safety, entertainment, and bonding come together!

specifications_table.Breed Recommendation: ‎French Bulldog, English Springer Spaniels, Border Collies, Staffordshire Bull Terriers, English Bulldogs, Cocker Spaniels, and German Shepherds, Small and Medium Dog Breed (Small dogs are generally recommended to weigh over 20 pounds)
